channel.title: Comments on: Episode 34 – Jolly Pumpkin – Noel de Calabaza
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: HonchoGrande
item.dc:creator: HonchoGrande
item.description:
Paul and John, it was nice meeting you at the Atlanta Cask Ale event. Noel de Calabaza has become my Christmas Eve beer the past few years. Keep up the great work!
James
item.content:encoded:
Paul and John, it was nice meeting you at the Atlanta Cask Ale event. Noel de Calabaza has become my Christmas Eve beer the past few years. Keep up the great work!

James

item.title: By: The Beer Wench
item.dc:creator: The Beer Wench
item.description:
I heart Brett.
Great review of the beer. Jolly Pumpkin kicks ass. Unfortunately, I have never tasted the Noel De Calabaza! Boo to me.
Cheers!
item.content:encoded:
I heart Brett.

Great review of the beer. Jolly Pumpkin kicks ass. Unfortunately, I have never tasted the Noel De Calabaza! Boo to me.

Cheers!

item.title: By: Joe
item.dc:creator: Joe
item.description: Nice, just recently started seeing Jolly Pumpkin in NJ and I really like what I've tried. I'll need to pick this sucker up.
item.content:encoded: Nice, just recently started seeing Jolly Pumpkin in NJ and I really like what I’ve tried. I’ll need to pick this sucker up.
